message:
feat: default Dolt server loglevel to debug per Dolt team recommendation

Dustin Brown (2026-02-24): "run the Dolt server with loglevel debug
or trace until everything is stable so you can send us the server logs
when you hit an issue." Defaults to debug; override with GT_DOLT_LOGLEVEL.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
